title: thehaj.space
body:
Welcome to **thehaj.space**, a modded Minecraft server created for a small, tight-knit community of queer folks and allies who love exploring the vast world of Minecraft through mods. Our server offers a unique, custom modpack designed to enhance gameplay with immersive features and exciting additions, all downloadable through Modrinth.

To join the adventure and be part of our inclusive community, we invite you to get whitelisted by visiting our Discord or checking our website for more details.

## Featured Mods in Our Modpack:

- **Ad-Astra: Giselle Addon** – A space exploration mod with thrilling rocket adventures and beyond.
- **Mekanism** – A high-tech mod focused on power generation, machines, and automation.
- **Create** – An innovative mod adding complex engineering solutions, automation tools, and aesthetic features.
- **Farmer's Delight** – For players who enjoy agriculture, it introduces enhanced farming mechanics and delicious new recipes.
- **Pride Craft** & **Undopia Pride Bees** – Celebrate diversity with themed content and pride-inspired creatures.
- **Chococraft** – Raise and ride your very own Chocobos, adding fantasy mounts to the game.
- **Applied Energistics 2** – Manage your items, craft automation systems, and more with this classic tech mod.
- **Xaero’s Minimap** & **Xaero’s World Map** – Navigate the world with ease using detailed maps.
- **Botania: Garden of Glass** – Explore a magic-based system of flora and energy in a beautiful skyblock setting.
- **Waystones** – Instantly travel between locations, making long journeys easier.
- **SecurityCraft** – Protect your base with security measures like cameras, keypads, and alarms.
- **Twigs**, **Chipped**, **Macaw’s Bridges/Windows/Roofs** – Enhance your world-building with beautifully designed architectural and decorative blocks.
- **Plushables** & **Plushy+** – Adorable plushies and decorations to make your base cozy.
- **No Chat Reports** – Enjoy secure, anonymous chat free from external moderation.
- **Simple Voice Chat** – Real-time, in-game voice communication with friends and teammates.

Our modpack offers a balance of tech, magic, building enhancements, and community-friendly features. Whether you’re into automation, exploration, creative construction, or just chilling with friends, there’s something here for every player.

Ready to jump in? Join our community, build your dream world, and have fun!
